hooks.command:
bash -c 'TOTAL=$(find ~/.claude/projects/*/memory -name "*.md" -exec cat {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "${TOTAL:-0}" -gt 150 ]; then echo "hint: [ComadSleep] Memory is ${TOTAL} lines. Auto-consolidation recommended.
To consolidate, start a new session and say: dream
To disable this hint, remove ~/.claude/hooks/comad-sleep-hook.json"; fi'

bash -c 'STATE="$HOME/.claude/.comad-sleep-state.json"; if [ -f "$STATE" ]; then LAST=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get('\''lastRun'\','\''never'\'))" "$STATE" 2>/dev/null || echo never); TOTAL=$(find ~/.claude/projects/*/memory -name "*.md" -exec cat {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "${TOTAL:-0}" -gt 150 ]; then echo "hint: [ComadSleep] Memory is ${TOTAL} lines (last consolidated: ${LAST}). Say \"dream\" to consolidate."; fi; fi'
